title: CAT on FIRE (visual enhancement)
description: This is a visual overhaul vanilla+ modpack I made for Minecraft, inspired by the feel of Bedrock's Actions & Stuff. I tried to make it look refreshing and smooth while still running well on most PCs
body:
![logofordesc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9665d335027fcda2f0e35f9daaa36c73bba4b0d7.png)

Cat on Fire is a vanilla+ modpack for Minecraft Java inspired by Action & Stuff.
This pack brings smooth and engaging gameplay feel to java, with some optimizations 😊

## ✨ Features
- Designed for smooth performance
- Hand-picked mods that enhance combat and exploration without going overboard 
- Built for both solo play and multiplayer sessions
- Packed with exciting, dynamic gameplay
- Inspired by Action & Stuff, but with its own unique feel

### Give my modpack a try! 🥺


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This is my first modpack, so expect bugs

</details>
